channel.title: Cartoons on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cartoons on smpaget blog

item.title: Are you unsure who or what to worship?
item.description: I previously blogged about Tom Gauld on this blog. He is a cartoonist who as part of his job provides cartoons for the Letters page of the Literary review section of The Guardian on Saturdays. I don’t read the letters in the section but i do always read his cartoons. they make me laugh and occasionally provide me with some Level 5 thinking. anyway this was the cartton in the paper 3 weeks ago. I cut it out and scanned it so you can all see it to! I almost contacted tom to use this image for the publicity for third sunday this month. I do think I perhaps need to save up £200 quid for the cartoon in the previous post and this one. (using his website, if you contact Tom he will send you the original version for around £100). This could become quite expensive! Technorati Tags - Cartoons & Tom Gauld

item.title: Le tourne-disque casse
item.description:
Tom Gauld does a weekly cartoon in the Guardian Book review section on a saturday.
I really like this cartoon but his website is pretty cool with some excellent laugh out loud moments.
I particularly like the way for about £100 he will send you an orgininal in paper & pen. I think thats a nice touch. so check out his website and buy his stuff. that’s kinda cool.

Tom Gauld’s website
